description: Triggers for creating and editing Obsidian Flavored Markdown notes with vault-specific syntax

queries.query: Create an Obsidian note for my meeting with Sarah about the Q3 roadmap
Write a new note about event sourcing for my Obsidian vault with wikilinks
Add a warning callout to this section of my Obsidian note
Embed the risks section from [[Risk Register]] into this note
Make a daily note for today with proper Obsidian frontmatter and tags
Add wikilinks to people and projects mentioned in this meeting note
Create a Zettelkasten atomic note about systems thinking with block IDs
Add a collapsible tip callout with installation instructions to this note
Set frontmatter properties on this note: type meeting, tags project and q3
Write a note that links to a specific heading in my Architecture Decisions file
Create a GitHub README.md for my open source project
Write a blog post in Markdown for my personal website
Fix the broken wikilinks in my vault notes
Standardize the frontmatter across all my vault notes
Summarize this YouTube video
Convert this PDF to Markdown
Create a Mermaid diagram of the CI/CD pipeline
Write a Python script to process text files
Format my resume as a Markdown document for LinkedIn
Generate a CHANGELOG.md file for my GitHub repository
